subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The ears of longing have successively attained unto the cooing of the dove of love and fellowship, and eyes have been blessed with beholding His signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد آذان طلب متتابعا بهدیر حمامه محبت و وداد فائز و ابصار بملاحظه آثار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @personal instructions, @business; financial; property matters
